projects.name: open-taxi-pulse
projects.verifiableFact: A publicly available Spark + dbt project that ingests NYC TLC trip records and publishes weekly anomaly reports; handles ~25M rows per month on a single-node setup and ships with a docker-compose for local testing.

projects.name: Personal Finance Lakehouse
projects.verifiableFact: Self-hosted dbt + DuckDB pipeline pulling 4 years of bank and credit card CSVs into a local lakehouse with automated categorization using a small LLM; personal monthly close takes 5 minutes instead of a Saturday afternoon.
